Professional Cleaning Services

Welcome to our home cleaning solutions section. Explore our exclusive service packages, thoughtfully designed to meet every need and lifestyle. Allow us the pleasure of providing your home with the comfort, cleanliness, and peace of mind it deserves.

We are fully insured with liability coverage to guarantee the maximum protection and confidence for your property.

View Services

About Me

Sandra Flórez

Sandra Flórez is an experienced cleaning professional with over a decade of industry expertise. Her commitment to excellence and attention to detail has established her as a trusted reference in the care of high-standard spaces throughout Manhattan.

With a long-standing career in New York's professional cleaning industry, Sandra is a recognized expert in the meticulous care of luxury properties. She has provided top-tier cleaning services in prestigious Manhattan hotels, exclusive residences across the city, and premium wellness spaces, including the iconic Fekkai salon at The Mark Hotel.

Her dedication to detail and excellence has built a solid reputation as a specialist in the maintenance of luxury spaces. Today, Sandra focuses entirely on bringing that same level of professionalism and excellence to every home she serves.

10+
Years of experience in NY
100%
Attention to detail
NYC
Manhattan · Luxury residences

What We Offer

Our Services

🪣
Standard Pro Cleaning

Complete maintenance of all common areas and general organization of the property.

This is not a rushed clean. Standard Pro is professional care with attention to every detail — where each surface, each corner, and each space receives a meticulous, systematic treatment. We apply certified, high-quality products, formulated specifically for each type of surface and material, delivering superior results you will feel from the very first visit.
  • Deep and detailed cleaning of kitchens, including exterior cleaning of all appliances
  • Thorough cleaning and disinfection of bathrooms
  • Organization and maintenance of bedrooms, living room and dining room
  • Exhaustive dusting of all surfaces
  • Cleaning of baseboards and moldings
  • Dusting of decorative objects, lamps, ceiling fans and air vents
  • Mirror polishing
  • Vacuuming and mopping all floors throughout the apartment
  • Trash removal
Starting at $90
Select Standard Cleaning
✨
Additional Deep Cleaning Services

Complement your standard cleaning with targeted deep-cleaning services, tailored to your home's specific needs.

  • Deep cleaning inside oven
  • Deep cleaning inside refrigerator
  • Deep cleaning of kitchen drawers, cabinets and shelving
  • Laundry and clothes folding
  • Interior cleaning of window glass and frames
  • Deep bathroom cleaning
  • Deep bedroom cleaning
  • Post-construction or renovation cleaning
Starting at $35
Add a Deep Cleaning Service
🏠
Move-In & Move-Out

360° deep cleaning for vacant properties before or after a move. Includes complete internal cleaning of all drawers, closets, refrigerator, oven, and all appliances — inside and out.

  • Empty apartments and homes
  • Property preparation for rental or sale
  • Removal of dust, residue, and post-construction debris
Starting at $150
Select Move-In / Move-Out

Referral Discount

Did you refer someone to us? If your referral becomes a client, you will receive a one-time 10% discount on your next cleaning. Just mention it in your booking notes.

Terms & Conditions

A 20% deposit is required to reserve your appointment. You may cancel or reschedule with at least 24 hours notice. Cancellations or rescheduling requests made with less than 24 hours notice are non-refundable.

Your information is confidential. We will receive it directly by email and contact you shortly to confirm your appointment.
